evidence_role.ja: この比較パックは時点観測であり、現在状態の権威ではありません。
evidence_role.en: This comparison pack is a point-in-time observation, not authority for live state.

freshness_explanation.ja: stale の証拠は履歴として有効な場合がありますが、現在状態の確認には再観測が必要です。
freshness_explanation.en: Stale evidence may remain valid history, but current state requires a new observation.

state.summary.ja: 基盤観測と限定実行の境界は維持。UI情報設計は選択待ちです。
state.summary.en: Observer foundations and bounded execution remain intact; the UI information architecture awaits selection.

state.change.ja: 同一データで3方向を比較する Intent Pack を追加。production generator は未変更です。
state.change.en: An Intent Pack now compares three directions with identical data; the production generator is unchanged.

decision.question.ja: A / B / C のどれが、現在状態と次の行動を最も早く理解できますか？
decision.question.en: Which of A / B / C makes the current state and next action fastest to understand?

decision.recommendation.ja: 調査上の推奨は A。反復トリアージで決定と証拠の距離が最も短いためです。これは採用決定ではありません。
decision.recommendation.en: Research recommends A because it keeps decisions closest to evidence during repeated triage. This is not an acceptance decision.

warning.primary.ja: pseudo-git-tag fixture warning。非ブロッキングの既知警告です。
warning.primary.en: Pseudo-git-tag fixture warning; a known non-blocking warning.

lane.observer.ja: Foundation Observer — verified：status snapshot と 4 adapters を観測可能。
lane.observer.en: Foundation Observer — verified: status snapshots and four adapters are observable.

lane.automation.en: Foundation Automation — verified_with_warning: validation 15 / 16 with one known warning.

lane.execution.ja: Execution Automation — bounded：C3 help-only x2、C4 validation probe x1。
lane.execution.en: Execution Automation — bounded: two help-only C3 probes and one C4 validation probe.

lane.review.ja: Project Review Surface — decision_pending：production UI の方向選択前。
lane.review.en: Project Review Surface — decision_pending: production UI direction has not been selected.

project.devcockpitcore.ja: 1. DevCockpitCore — yellow：local validation warn、今回の優先対象。
project.devcockpitcore.en: 1. DevCockpitCore — yellow: local validation warns; current priority.

source.notice.ja: stale の証拠は履歴として有効な場合がありますが、現在状態の確認には再観測が必要です。
source.notice.en: Stale evidence may remain valid history, but current state requires a new observation.
